q: What are the differences between team sports and individual sports?
examiner_note: So sánh sự phối hợp (collaboration) vs sự tự lực (self-reliance). Sử dụng 'collective effort', 'personal accountability', 'interpersonal skills'.

band7.text: I think the main difference is the level of collaboration required. Team sports rely on communication and collective effort, whereas individual sports are more about personal discipline, focus, and self-reliance.
band7.note: Sử dụng từ nối tốt (whereas) và so sánh rõ ràng.

band8.text: The fundamental distinction lies in the distribution of responsibility. In team sports, success is a byproduct of synergy and interpersonal skills. Conversely, individual sports put the spotlight on personal accountability and mental fortitude, as there’s no one else to fall back on.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao (fundamental distinction, byproduct, synergy, Conversely, mental fortitude).

band9.text: The core divergence is centered around the dynamics of achievement. Team sports necessitate a high degree of synchronicity and shared vision, fostering a collaborative mindset. In stark contrast, individual pursuits prioritize self-mastery and internal resilience, where the athlete’s psychological endurance is tested in isolation, without the safety net of a group.
band9.note: Cấu trúc câu phức tạp và từ vựng chuyên sâu (divergence, necessitate, synchronicity, shared vision, In stark contrast, isolation, safety net).

v.example: The team's success was due to their perfect synergy.
Individual sports require great mental fortitude.

advanced_vocab.example: There is a clear divergence between the two approaches.

similar_questions: Which do you prefer, team or individual sports?
What can children learn from individual sports?
